name: Sylvani
description: The Sylvani are a vast interconnected botanical intelligence that achieved sentience through mycelial-neural networks spanning continent-sized root systems on a lush garden world. They achieved spaceflight not through physics or metallurgy but by bioengineering organisms capable of surviving vacuum, growing living hulls that breathe and self-repair. Patient beyond any animal species' comprehension, a single Sylvani decision may unfold over decades — but the outcomes are almost always optimal.
